name: animate.css
description: 🍿 A cross-browser library of CSS animations. As easy to use as an easy thing.

commits.message: Add a missing word in the custom build section of the documentation (#1681)
Update README to reflect license change
Add automatic code analyses for security
Update readme to include import example (#1271)
👌 IMPROVE: update CSSNano, add Security Policy (#1317)
fixed typo, the word 'familiar' spelled incorrectly (#1279)
fix: 🐛 allow lint-staged works with .mjs files (#1238)
Add Fork Corner on doc site (#1206)

issues.title: docs: fix typos in LICENSE and comments
zoomIn: possible to only play last few percents of animation (i.e. start from 3/4 size and play to full size)
fix(docs): add hover effect to footer links
Fix #1796: When added an animation on hover effect it starts the animat
fix: migrate PostCSS config to v8 plugin API and update dependencies
docs: clarify supported contribution types in CONTRIBUTING.md
Enhance footer link interactivity with animated hover effect
feat: Add Copy Button to Documentation Code Snippets (#1842)
feat(ui): visual refresh for Docs UI (CSS-only)
Visual Refresh of Docs UI (`style.css` only)
Add Mixture of Experts AGI Animation Demo
Add Hover Effect to Footer Links for Improved UX
feat: added shakeFade animation to animate.css
Feat: able to copy the terminal code to the clip-board
Suggestion to Add New Features for Scroll-based, 3D, and Mouse Interactions Animations

Add DOM Style version of animate.css
